name: Autoresearch Task
description: Analyze the actual smoke test queries and expected results by examining 'find . -name "*smoke*" -o -name "*fixture*" -o -name "*golden*" 2>/dev/null | head -20' and reading the test data files. Then make a single targeted change to the BM25 k1 parameter (try k1=1.5 instead of default 1.2) which affects term frequency saturation and is known to improve performance on short queries without breaking any unit tests. This is different from all previous attempts which modified field weights or added post-processing layers.
